mapper.select: SELECT TEWM.ID AS EDU_WORD_MAP_ID, TBW.ID, TBW.WORDS_TITLE, TBW.WORDS_DETAIL, TBW.WORDS_IMAGE, TBW.WORDS_TYPE, TBW.EDU_VIDEO_ID, TBW.SIGN_WORD_ID FROM TBL_EDU_WORD_MAP TEWM JOIN TBL_WORDS TBW ON TEWM.WORDS_ID = TBW.ID WHERE TEWM.EDU_ID = #{eduId} ORDER BY TEWM.ID ASC

SELECT TEWM.ID AS EDU_WORD_MAP_ID, TBW.ID, TBW.WORDS_TITLE, TBW.WORDS_DETAIL, TBW.WORDS_IMAGE, TBW.WORDS_TYPE, TBW.EDU_VIDEO_ID, TBW.SIGN_WORD_ID FROM TBL_EDU_WORD_MAP TEWM JOIN TBL_WORDS TBW ON TEWM.WORDS_ID = TBW.ID WHERE TEWM.ID IN ( SELECT ID FROM ( SELECT ID FROM TBL_EDU_WORD_MAP WHERE EDU_ID = #{eduId} ORDER BY DBMS_RANDOM.VALUE() ) WHERE ROWNUM <= #{limit} ) ORDER BY TEWM.ID ASC
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_WORDS.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TBL_WORDS(ID, WORDS_TITLE, WORDS_DETAIL, WORDS_IMAGE, WORDS_TYPE, EDU_VIDEO_ID, SIGN_WORD_ID) VALUES(#{id}, #{wordsTitle}, #{wordsDetail}, #{wordsImage}, #{wordsType}, #{eduVideoId}, #{signWordId})
